title: v2 api: /libpod/images/{import,load,pull}
body: Implement the v2 endpoints for pulling, loading and importing images.

comments.body:
@jwhonce @baude PTAL

The "import" and "load" endpoints will follow soon but given my workday is about to end, you may already have a look at "pull".

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod).
```
Error initializing source docker://registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora-minimal:latest: error pinging docker registry registry.fedoraproject.org: invalid status code from registry 503 (Service Unavailable)
```
registry.fedoraproject.org is striking again
